'''Phlegmin''' was the kitchen boy who assisted [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] chef [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]].

==Biography==
Phlegmin was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a kitchen boy in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]<ref name="CSWE" /> on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> [[J'Quille/Legends|J'Quille]] paid him to put slow-acting [[Poison/Legends|poison]] into the freckled [[Frog/Legends|frogs]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] would eat.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Phlegmin may have also been motivated to do this by the fact that Jabba had his brother fed to a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] due to a dislike for a sauce. He used this information to anonymously blackmail J'Quille.<ref name="TERC" /> He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Dannik Jerriko]].

His mummified body was carried around by [[Gartogg/Legends|Gartogg]].

{{Char-stub}}
